description: Data from journald should be kept in the confines of the service and not forwarded to other services.
rationale: If journald is the method for capturing logs, all logs of the system should be handled by journald and not forwarded to other logging mechanisms.
ocil_clause: is commented out or not configured correctly
ocil:
Run the following command to verify that journald is not forwarding logs to syslog. 
grep "^\sForwardToSyslog" /etc/systemd/journald.conf /etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf
and it should return 
ForwardToSyslog=no
title: Ensure journald ForwardToSyslog is disabled
